backups.rowSubtitle: Status and download of the encrypted copy
backups.title: Backups
backups.encryptedNote: The file is encrypted. It can only be decrypted with your backup key on a computer.
backups.webOnly: Download is available in the web version (in a browser).

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.intro: Your account will be deleted and your publisher record anonymised: name and contact details are removed. The congregation's organisational records are kept in anonymised form. Please confirm with your password.
deleteAccount.note: After deletion you will be signed out.
deleteAccount.lastAdmin: You are the only administrator. Assign another administrator before deleting your account.

legal.title: Legal information
legal.subtitle: Imprint, privacy, terms
legal.prevailNote: In case of discrepancy, the German version prevails.

publisherAccess.noAccess: This person has no app login.
publisherAccess.privateDataByRole: Elders and administrators see personal data based on their role.
publisherAccess.privateDataDesc: Contacts, addresses, notes and personal dates of publishers. Enable only for those who need it for their service.
publisherAccess.disabled: Access disabled — login is not possible.
publisherAccess.changeEmailDesc: The person will log in with the new email. The password does not change.
publisherAccess.inviteHint: The person will receive an email with a link and set their own password (the link is valid for 72 hours).
publisherAccess.manualHint: The role is assigned automatically when the person receives an assignment. Share the password with them separately — it is no longer shown here.
publisherAccess.resetHint: Share the new password with the person separately.

webPush.title: Browser notifications
webPush.iosHint: To enable, first add the site to your home screen
webPush.deniedBody: Open browser settings and allow notifications for this site.

profile.userManagementDescription: Create users, change roles, activate, reset passwords

changePassword.intro: Enter your current password, then a new one. At least 8 characters. Your current session stays signed in after the change.
changePassword.successBody: Your password has been updated. Existing sessions on this device stay signed in.
changePassword.note: Tip: if you forgot your current password, ask an administrator to reset it via User management.

errors.tooShort: New password must be at least 8 characters
errors.sameAsCurrent: New password must differ from current password

profile.title: Profile
profile.meetingSettingsDescription: Day, time and address of the meetings
profile.hallsDescription: Addresses for meetings and field service
profile.circuitOverseerDescription: Default name for the CO visit

removal.title: Remove publisher
removal.webPrompt: Removal reason: moved / disfellowshipped / died / other
removal.hint: Died · moved · removed — the record is kept and can be restored

purge.title: Delete permanently
purge.confirm: Permanently delete the record for {{name}}? This cannot be undone.
purge.hasHistory: This publisher has history (reports or assignments). Permanent deletion is blocked — use "Mark as departed" instead.

categories.field_service: Apply Yourself to the Field Ministry

auth.subtitle: Sign in to your congregation
auth.noAccountHint: Accounts are created by your congregation administrator. No access yet? Reach out to them.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Forgot your password? Contact your congregation administrator.

forgot.title: Password recovery
forgot.subtitle: Enter the email you sign in with — we will send a link to set a new password.
forgot.sent: If this address is registered, we have sent it an email with a link. The link is valid for 1 hour.
forgot.checkSpam: No email? Check your spam folder.

reset.title: New password
reset.success: Password changed. You can sign in with the new password now.
reset.invalidLink: This link is invalid or has expired.

reports.noReportsHint: Tap the + above to submit your first monthly report.
reports.alreadySubmitted: Already submitted. Go back and tap the pencil icon to edit.
reports.didTheyShare: Did they share in the ministry this month?
reports.didYouShare: Did you share in the ministry this month?

alerts.alreadySubmittedBody: A report for {{month}} already exists. Go back and tap the pencil icon to edit it.
alerts.validationServedOnBehalf: Please indicate whether they served this month.
alerts.validationServedSelf: Please indicate whether you served this month.

errors.notLinkedToPublisher: Your account is not linked to a publisher record. Please contact an elder or admin.
errors.selfEditWindowClosed: This report can no longer be edited. The self-edit window (1st–10th of the following month) has closed. Contact an elder or admin to request changes.

removeConfirm.title: Remove group
removeConfirm.webMessage: Remove this group? Members will be unlinked.

serviceGroups.noMembersYet: No members in this group yet
serviceGroups.noPublishersToAdd: All publishers are already in this group

removeMember.title: Remove from group?
removeMember.body: {{name}} will be removed from the group.

import.title: Import schedule EPUB
import.subtitle: Upload Meeting Workbook (mwb_*.epub) or Watchtower study (w_*.epub) to auto-create the weekly programme. Existing empty slots are filled with official titles; assignments with publishers are preserved.

errors.webOnly: File import is available in the web version (open mycongregation.org in a desktop browser).
errors.noWeeks: No weekly programmes found in this file. Is it a Meeting Workbook?

import.unknownTypeWarning: Filename doesn't match expected pattern. Backend will try to detect, but may reject the file.
import.privacyNote: The file is parsed right in your browser and is never uploaded to the server — only part titles and durations go into the schedule.

unassign.confirmBody: The program part will remain in the schedule.
unassign.confirmWebMessage: Unassign the publisher from this part? The program part will remain.

schedule.readOnlyBanner: Read-only — you don't have permission to edit this part

planning.title: Meeting planning
planning.allAssigned: Every part of this meeting is assigned

publishDialog.title: Publish meeting
publishDialog.subtitle: Assignments become visible to everyone. Notify the brothers?

congressWeek.noMeetings: No congregation meetings are held during the convention week

dialog.title: Notify about changes
dialog.subtitle: Publishers will be notified that the published programme has changed.
dialog.silentHint: Apply the changes without notifying publishers.

audit.noEditsHint: This report has not been modified since it was submitted.

activity.noActivityHint: Reports submitted and status changes will appear here.

pickers.showingAllNoFilter: Showing all — capability filter is OFF
pickers.neverDidPart3mo: Hasn't done this part in 3 months
pickers.neverDidDuty3mo: Hasn't done this duty in 3 months

create.title: New user
create.passwordHint: At least 8 characters. Share with the user out-of-band — the password is not shown again here.

changeRole.title: Change role
changeRole.subtitle: Current role for {{email}}: {{current}}
changeRole.confirmDemoteAdminBody: {{email}} will no longer be able to manage system users. Continue?

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Set a new password for {{email}}. Share it with the user out-of-band.

deactivate.confirmBody: {{email}} will no longer be able to sign in. Data is preserved. Continue?

activate.confirmBody: {{email}} will be able to sign in again.

adminLimit.banner: We recommend no more than 2 administrators. Currently active: {{count}}.
adminLimit.confirmBody: Two administrators are usually enough for a congregation (currently active: {{count}}). Assign another one anyway?

responsibilities.title: Responsibilities
responsibilities.subtitle: Assign the brothers responsible for schedule sections. The assigned brother will be able to edit his section.

types.body_coordinator: Coordinator of the Body of Elders

meetingSettings.title: Meeting time & place
meetingSettings.effectiveFromHint: Saving creates a new schedule version from this date. Past weeks keep their previous day and time.

duties.title: Duties
duties.removeConfirmBody: Remove this duty from the meeting?

warnings.already_on_duty: Already assigned to another duty in this meeting
warnings.has_program_part: Already has a program part in this meeting
warnings.capability_off: Not marked as able for this duty

fieldService.title: Field Ministry Meetings

generate.title: Generate schedule
generate.hint: Each rule is a recurring meeting: which Saturday of the month, when and where. Dates for the chosen months are computed automatically. Conductor and topic stay empty.
generate.previewEmpty: No matching dates — check the template

fieldService.doubleWeek: Already leads a meeting this week

coVisit.title: Circuit overseer schedule
coVisit.serviceKindHint: e.g. territory, return visit, Bible study
coVisit.eldersTitle: Meeting with elders and ministerial servants
coVisit.elders: Meeting with elders and ministerial servants
coVisit.printWebOnly: PDF printing is available in the web version.
coVisit.printBlocked: The browser blocked the print window. Allow pop-ups.
coVisit.copyConfirm: Creates entries on the same days, times and places (field service, lunches). Field-service partners will need to be reassigned. Existing entries are not duplicated.

witnessing.publishConfirm: Names will become visible to everyone. Publish the week?
witnessing.notOpen: This week's schedule is not open yet
witnessing.deleteWeekConfirm: Delete this week with all slots and applications?
witnessing.applied: Application sent. The responsible will distribute.
witnessing.notEligible: You are not eligible to apply

cartLocations.title: Witnessing points
cartLocations.name: Name
cartLocations.removeBody: The point will be permanently deleted.

cart.title: Carts
cart.removeBody: The shift and all its participants will be deleted.
cart.removeWeb: Delete this shift and all its participants?

specialEvents.replacesMeetingHint: No regular meeting on this day

fields.title: Title
fields.replacesMeeting: No regular meeting on this day

replaced.hidden: Hidden assignments: {{count}} — move or cancel them

formNotice.title: Event on this date
formNotice.replaces: The event replaces this meeting — check whether the assignment is needed

absences.overlapWarning: This person already has an absence:

myTasksScreen.title: My assignments
myTasksScreen.empty: No assignments in the coming weeks

feed.empty: No meetings in the next 7 days

halls.title: Kingdom Halls
halls.hint: An address reference list: when creating a field-service meeting, a hall address is filled in with one tap. Past meetings keep their address as-is.
halls.name: Name

localNeeds.intro: A topic bank for the “Living as Christians” part. Plan topics and slot them into the week you need.
localNeeds.empty: No topics yet. Add topics that concern the congregation.

placeholders.title: e.g. Reminder about cleaning the Kingdom Hall

localNeeds.insertEmpty: No planned topics. Add them on the Local Needs screen (the bulb icon in the schedule header).
localNeeds.noAccess: Local Needs are available to elders only.

circuitOverseer.intro: These details pre-fill a new circuit-overseer-visit event. Each visit keeps its own name snapshot, so editing here doesn't change past visits.
circuitOverseer.wifeHint: Optional — if the circuit overseer is married.
circuitOverseer.listIntro: Circuit overseers (and substitutes) your congregation may host. One is marked primary and pre-fills a new visit; you can pick a different one in the visit form. Each visit keeps its own name snapshot, so changes here never rewrite past visits.
circuitOverseer.deleteConfirmBody: Remove “{{name}}” from the list? This won’t affect visits already created.
circuitOverseer.emptyList: No one yet. Add a circuit overseer.

speakerProfile.title: Speaker
speakerProfile.recentWarning: Visited recently — it may be too soon to invite again.
speakerProfile.repertoireLegend: ✓ — already given here · highlighted — not yet ({{fresh}})

ourSpeakerProfile.title: Our speaker
ourSpeakerProfile.recentWarning: This brother spoke recently — consider giving others a turn.

ourSpeakers.title: Our speakers
ourSpeakers.subtitle: Our brothers who give public talks
ourSpeakers.hint: Brothers who give public talks (here and away). Sort and filter with the buttons below.

talkCoordinator.title: Talk coordinator
talkCoordinator.intro: Keep incoming and outgoing speakers, their talks and the directories. The “Incoming / Outgoing” log will live here.
talkCoordinator.noAccess: Available to the public talk coordinator.

congregations.title: Congregations
congregations.subtitle: Other congregations (where speakers come from / go to)
congregations.hint: Directory of other congregations — used when picking speakers and trips.
congregations.name: Name

speakers.title: Visiting speakers
speakers.subtitle: Speakers from other congregations and their talks
speakers.hint: Directory of visiting speakers. Repertoire = the talk numbers he gives.

log.title: Incoming / Outgoing log
log.subtitle: Visiting and outgoing talks in one list
log.speaker: Speaker
log.noSpeakers: Add speakers to the directory first.
log.noCongregations: Add congregations to the directory first.
log.deleteBody: The linked absence will also be removed. The talk stays in the program.
log.conflictBody: That week already has a public talk in the program. Replace it with this speaker?

rules.intro: Automation rules specific to your congregation. They are not part of the shared template and are off by default.
rules.adminOnly: Only an admin can change rules.

autoAssign.title: Auto-assignments
autoAssign.midweekBody: Whoever is assigned meeting chairman is automatically given the concluding prayer.
autoAssign.weekendBody: Whoever is assigned meeting chairman is automatically given the opening prayer.
autoAssign.noteCapability: The prayer is filled only if the brother has the matching capability. If not, you will be prompted to add it and the slot stays empty.
autoAssign.noteManual: Manual edits win: if you assign someone else to the prayer, the rule will not touch it again.
autoAssign.noteExisting: Already-filled weeks are not changed — the rule applies on new assignments.
autoAssign.notePublished: If the meeting is already published, the change marks it as changed (a notification is sent).
autoAssign.micBody: Whoever gives the Treasures from God's Word talk is automatically assigned to microphone #1.

warn.title: Capability not set
warn.prayerCapability: To auto-assign the prayer, add the “Prayer” capability to {{name}} in their publisher card.
warn.micCapability: {{name}} was put on microphone #1 but lacks the “Microphone” capability — check their publisher card.
warn.micTaken: Microphone #1 is already taken manually — auto-fill skipped.
